mapper.select:
SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_REWARD t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1 AND (t1.ACTIVITY = 1 OR t1.ACTIVITY IS NULL)
AND t2.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND t2.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{localName} || '%'
AND t1.REWARD_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{rewardType} || '%'
ORDER BY t1.REWARD_DATE DESC

SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL AS DEPT_NAME FROM HR_REWARD t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE t1.REWARD_NO = #{rewardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_REWARD ( REWARD_NO, PERSON_ID, REWARD_TYPE, REWARD_DATE, REWARD_CNPY, REWARD, REWARD_TYPE_CODE, REWARD_PAY_DATE, PERSONNEL_CARD_INQUIRY, PAY_APPEAR_ISNOT, LINE_ID, OTHER_TYPE, REMARKS, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATED_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_REWARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{rewardType}, #{rewardDate}, #{rewardCnpy}, #{reward}, #{rewardTypeCode}, #{rewardPayDate}, #{personnelCardInquiry}, #{payAppearIsnot}, #{lineId}, #{otherType}, #{remarks}, 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_REWARD SET PERSON_ID = #{personId}, REWARD_TYPE = #{rewardType}, REWARD_DATE = #{rewardDate}, REWARD_CNPY = #{rewardCnpy}, REWARD = #{reward}, REWARD_TYPE_CODE = #{rewardTypeCode}, REWARD_PAY_DATE = #{rewardPayDate}, PERSONNEL_CARD_INQUIRY = #{personnelCardInquiry}, PAY_APPEAR_ISNOT = #{payAppearIsnot}, LINE_ID = #{lineId}, OTHER_TYPE = #{otherType}, REMARKS = #{remarks}, UPDATED_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE REWARD_NO = #{rewardNo}
